aids.title: Binary Tree Types - FCS
aids.content:
**F**ull: every node has 0 or 2 children
**C**omplete: all levels filled, last level left-filled
**S**kewed: all nodes have only one child (degenerates to linked list)
aids.forRemembering: Three important types of binary trees

aids.title: Key Binary Tree Formulas
aids.content:
Max nodes at level k = 2^k
Max nodes in tree of height h = 2^(h+1) - 1
Min height for n nodes = floor(log2(n))
Leaf nodes = Internal nodes + 1 (in full binary tree)

aids.title: Array Index Formulas (0-indexed)
aids.content:
For node at index i:
- Left child = 2i + 1
- Right child = 2i + 2
- Parent = floor((i - 1) / 2)

Works perfectly for complete binary trees.
